scope_note: v0.4.0 declares this baseline as shared (skill stability is intrinsically about the SKILL, language-agnostic). Decision D2 (resolved 2026-04-27 post-R2): Lenient default — one shared score across languages. Progressive fallback: shared-core skills with generalization_debt (tdd-patterns, idempotent-retry-safety, network-error-classification) flip to per-language only if Phase B data shows ≥3pp divergence; D6=Split (rule shared, examples in <pack>/conventions.yaml) is the canonical resolution. See docs/LANGUAGE-AGNOSTIC-DECISIONS.md and docs/R2-DEBT-REWRITE-FEASIBILITY.md.
note: SDK-mode skill-health baseline per CLAUDE.md Rule #23 and baseline-manager SDK-MODE Delta 2. Tracks longitudinal skill stability under learning-engine body-patch regime (no runtime skill synthesis). First baseline established from sdk-dragonfly-s2 F4a/F4b/F7 signals.

skill_stability.computation_note: 2 patch-level bumps applied (go-error-handling-patterns 1.0.0→1.0.1, go-example-function-patterns 0.1.0→0.1.1) across 19 skills invoked this run = 2/19 = 0.105. Target <0.3 after 10-run rolling avg. Current single-run value is below target.

existing_skill_patch_accept_rate.computation_note: 2/2 F7 patch-level skill bumps applied without rollback (SP-01 error-handling triggers, SP-02 example-function triggers). No golden-corpus gate executed (golden-corpus/dragonfly-v1/ empty; human-seed pending per seq 151). Accept rate is nominal 1.0 but caveat: corpus-gate bypassed.

manifest_miss_rate.computation_note: G24 §Guardrails-Manifest PASS (0 blocking misses of 38 scripts). G23 §Skills-Manifest WARN (8/27 misses = 0.296 warn-rate, non-blocking). Target 0 for blocking after library stabilizes; WARN tracked separately per SDK-MODE Delta 2.

learning_patches_reverted_by_user.computation_note: Replaces the retired golden_regression_rate metric (full-replay regression retired post-sdk-dragonfly-s2 — dominated Phase 4 token spend with no signal beyond the devil fleet). Counts how many learning-engine patches the user reverted at H10 review of feedback/learning-notifications.md. Target: trending down (well-calibrated notifications).

mean_time_to_green_sec.computation_note: Not measured this run (no wall-clock instrumentation for first-green-test). Monitor trend once metrics-collector F1 adds this signal.

user_overrides: Mode A override at run-start (TPRD §16 declared Mode B; user directed greenfield regeneration)
DEP-BUMP-UNAPPROVED Option A resolution at seq 38/39 (testcontainers-go MVS bumps approved)
user_intervention_rate.computation_note: Counting 'overrides' = user directives that deviated from declared pipeline path; not all HITL approvals count as interventions. Baseline = 2 overrides. Target trending down; flat or up signals gate miscalibration.

go-error-handling-patterns.reason: SP-01 trigger-keyword expansion (added mapErr, sentinel switch, precedence order, errors.Is, fmt.Errorf %w chain); no body change.
pending_bumps: MINOR v1.1.0 body split (service-mode vs SDK-client-mode branch) deferred — awaiting golden-corpus seed

go-example-function-patterns.reason: SP-02 trigger-keyword expansion (added ExampleCache_, godoc example, Example_ function, docs wave); no body change. Preserved v0.1.x draft semantics (plan named v1.0.0→v1.0.1 but actual frontmatter was draft; patch-level bump preserved).

raise_policy.description: Skill-health is a mixed-direction dashboard: stability/accept-rate/green-time target improvement; miss-rate/intervention-rate/learning_patches_reverted_by_user target decrease. Baselines are locked at current values on first run; future runs are evaluated per-metric.
